69c3f34005bc77265d0e3d49::neutral::Telug.title: Shapoorji Pallonji Group unit likely to face higher costs in new fundraising, sources say
69c3f34005bc77265d0e3d49::neutral::Telug.description: Shapoorji Pallonji Group company, Goswami Infratech, plans to raise funds. Investors are demanding higher interest rates. This follows a similar situation with another group unit, Porteast Investment. The new bond issue might be delayed. Funds are needed to refinance existing debt and for corporate needs. The issuance is secured by a stake in Tata Sons.

69c3f35105bc77265d0e3d52::genz::English.title: SC ruling casts a tax shadow on merger share-swap deals
69c3f35105bc77265d0e3d52::genz::English.description: A Supreme Court ruling impacts shareholders in company mergers. Those receiving new shares via share-swap may face taxes on gains, even without selling. This applies if their old shares were considered 'stock-in-trade'. The difference in value between old and new shares will be taxed as business income. This decision could lead to more tax disputes for investors and traders.

69c3f34f05bc77265d0e3d51::genz::English.title: Davos Vibe Check: India's Bringing the Chat to the Global Stage
69c3f34f05bc77265d0e3d51::genz::English.description: Okay, so Davos is low-key kinda lit rn with the World Economic Forum happening. This tiny Swiss town is basically the HQ for all the big brains talking about the economy, politics, and tech stuff. This year's whole mood is 'let's actually talk it out,' which is kinda necessary when everyone's kinda beefing. Basically, it's all about keeping it 100 and not ghosting each other, even when things get spicy.
